message:
fix: add auth and restrict CORS on cancel-chat and events endpoints (#3829, #3830) (#3839)

- handleCancelChatHTTP: replace wildcard CORS with origin-checked header,
  add Authorization to allowed headers, add validateToken check
- handleEventsHTTP: add validateToken check consistent with all other
  data endpoints

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
